prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约18930→20713→24024→55030→24396名。2024年出现异常暴跌至55030名，2025年大幅回升至24396名，接近2023年水平，显示2024年 断档属偶发事件，2025年已基本修复。近3年（2023–2025）位次在24000名附近波动，2025年基准约24396名；该校在重庆物理类招生计划2021年69人→2022年64 人→2023年62人→2024年58人→2025年53人，呈逐年递减趋势；2026年计划46人，较2025年缩招7人（-13.2%），缩招幅度较大，理论上降低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北 师范大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学主榜2026年约第48名，在师范类院校中仅次于北京师范大学和华东师范大学，排名近年稳定在44–53区间；2026年声誉评价为偏正面，主要因该校硕士报考热度高涨（拟招3100人、报考预估破1.5万），教育学领域人气持续走高；抖音热度排名第67位（一般），未见明显负面舆情或投 档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，世界史A+、教育学A+、马克思主义理论A+、统计学A、生态学A-、生物学A-，A类学科数量在211师范院校中领先，对报考有较 强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 师范/教育大类2024年热度指数55.84（分化观望），较2023年63.81有所降温，但部属师范院校的公费师范生政策仍具吸引力；计算机类、电 子信息等工科专业社会热度较高，东北师大相关专业有一定竞争力。重庆2026年普通高考总人数约20.9万，较2025年（约21.3万）略有下降，物理类考生估算约13.7万（较2025年 13.95万略降），竞争压力小幅缓解。；东北师范大学位于吉林省长春市，在重庆招生占比约6%–7%（2021年94人/1367总计 划），属跨省招生中占比中等偏上的省份，地域偏好无明显异常。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次24396名、2026年大幅缩招13.2%（降低门槛）、声誉偏正面（提升关注度 ）、重庆物理类考生略降（缓解竞争）等因素，考虑声誉正面带来的报考热度小幅上移，最终预测最低位次约22513名，区间22013–23013名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 18930 → 20713 → 24024 → 55030 → 24396. In 2024, there was an abnormal drop to 55030, but in 2025 it rebounded significantly to 24396, close to the 2023 level, indicating that the 2024 gap was an isolated incident and has been largely repaired by 2025. In the past three years (2023–2025), the ranking fluctuated around 24000, with a baseline of approximately 24396 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing decreased year by year: 69 in 2021 → 64 in 2022 → 62 in 2023 → 58 in 2024 → 53 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 46, a reduction of 7 (-13.2%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large reduction, theoretically lowering the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeast Normal University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Main Ranking, it is approximately 48th, ranking only behind Beijing Normal University and East China Normal University among normal universities, with a stable ranking in the 44–53 range in recent years. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly positive, mainly due to the high popularity of the university's master's programs (planned enrollment of 3100, estimated applicants exceeding 15000), and the sustained popularity in the field of education. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 67th (average), with no significant negative public opinion or enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it achieved A+ in World History, Education, and Marxist Theory, A in Statistics, A- in Ecology, and A- in Biology. The number of A-level disciplines is leading among 211 normal universities, which has a strong appeal for applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity index for the Normal/Education category in 2024 was 55.84 (differentiation and wait-and-see), a decrease from 63.81 in 2023, but the public-funded normal student policy of ministry-affiliated normal universities remains attractive. Engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information have high social popularity, and Northeast Normal University's related majors have certain competitiveness. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Chongqing is approximately 209,000, slightly down from about 213,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 137,000 (slightly down from 139,500 in 2025), leading to a slight easing of competition pressure. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin Province, and its enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 6%–7% (94 out of 1367 total in 2021), which is a medium-to-high proportion among cross-provincial enrollments, with no obvious abnormal regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 24396, the significant enrollment reduction of 13.2% in 2026 (lowering the threshold), the slightly positive reputation (increasing attention), and the slight decrease in Chongqing Physics Category examinees (easing competition), along with the slight upward shift in application popularity due to positive reputation, the final predicted minimum ranking is approximately 22513, with a range of 22013–23013.

Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (22013) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 experimental class majors; those with rankings around the middle of the range (22500) are advised to prioritize Tier 2 majors such as Computer Class and Physics Class, while also attempting Tier 1; candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (23013) are advised to focus on Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a safety, prioritizing Education Class (A+ discipline) and Geographical Science Class.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2629 → 2882 → 3622 → 3983 → 3581. From 2021 to 2024, it continuously moved backward (cumulative backward movement of about 1354 places), and in 2025 it rebounded to 3581 (moving forward 402 places compared to 2024), indicating that the ranking fluctuates within the range of 3500–4000, with a baseline of about 3581 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 25 in 2021 → 26 in 2022 → 26 in 2023 → 25 in 2024 → 26 in 2025, basically stable at 25–26; the 2026 plan is 27, a slight expansion of 1 person (+3.85%) compared to 2025, with limited expansion impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class, approximately 48th in the main Soft Science ranking, one of the six normal universities directly under the Ministry of Education, firmly in the first tier among normal universities; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is slightly positive, with high popularity for master's applications (application-to-admission ratio about 5:1), sustained popularity in the field of education; Douyin popularity ranking 67th (average), no record of admission gaps, overall public opinion stable and positive; World History A+ (first in the country), Marxist Theory A+, Education A+, Statistics A, these disciplines highly correspond to the majors enrolled in History Category (History, Marxist Theory, Education), with outstanding disciplinary strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The normal/education category had a heat index of 55.84 in 2024 (differentiation and wait-and-see), but the policy for ministry-affiliated normal university publicly-funded normal students is stable; Chinese Language and Literature (Wenchang Experimental Class) is a new high-quality project for 2026. The estimated number of History Category candidates in Chongqing in 2026 is about 72,000 (slightly down from 73,400 in 2025), with a slight easing of competitive pressure. Northeast Normal University is located in Changchun, Jilin, with a History Category enrollment share in Chongqing of about 6%–7%, a relatively stable source province for cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline of 3581, the slight expansion of 3.85% in 2026 (slightly increasing competition), the slightly positive reputation (increasing attention), the slight decrease in History Category candidates (easing competition), and the strong appeal of A+ disciplines, and taking into account the competition easing from positive reputation and candidate decrease, the final predicted minimum ranking is about 3634, with a range of 3134–4134.
